vocabularyMapping.partial → partial-shorthand: CSS partial entries on shorthand properties with probe=value-accepted-but-not-computed
vocabularyMapping.partial → parser-only: CSS partial entries on non-shorthand properties where probe=value-accepted-but-not-computed only
vocabularyMapping.partial → stub: JS partial entries (objects with missing members)
vocabularyMapping.stub-heavy → stub: JS objects where most methods are stubs
vocabularyMapping.missing-from-window → missing: 1527 JS globals not present on window
